title: content smp (fan made 1.20.1)
description: there was a fan made content smp modpack on 1.19.2 and since it was only on that arsenal and defile wasnt there so i did it i upgraded every mod from the modpack to 1.20.1
body:
**im not the original creator of these mods content smp the youtube series inspired the modpack and most of these mods were made by the members of content smp**

**this modpack does not contain ANY paid or private mods**

**if there is a problem or im missing mods or there are mods to update dont be scared and text me on discord my username is olkascz#0000**

the last fanmade modpack for csmp is on 1.19.2 and has been updated 6 months ago as of right now (2025-2-20 so it doesnt have defile or arsenal so i updated the mods to 1.20.1 and added the new mods
if your wondering this is the fanmade modpack [the fan made modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-content-smp/version/1.19.2)
its my first time posting a modpack on here so dont get too angry at my stupidity if this looks bad
also if your pc is bad like mine (i have a school laptop) ima post a barebones modpack

texture pack made by:Eternal flame (on discord as 3xl0mc)
